name: ai-desktop-assistant
description: Linux desktop AI assistant built with Electron, React, Express, and Ollama.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:3001 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/ollama.js && node --check backend/models.js && node --check backend/search.js && node --check backend/rag/ingest.js && node --check backend/rag/retrieve.js && node --check backend/rag/embeddings.js && node --check main/electron-main.js && node --check main/preload.js
